name: Basic CI Pipeline

# Trigger pipeline when code is pushed to main (TBD)
on:
  push:
    branches: [ "main" ]

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      # Step 1: Get code from repo
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3

      # Step 2: Setup Python
      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v4
        with:
          python-version: "3.10"

      # Step 3: Install dependencies
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pip install -r requirements.txt

      # Step 4: Run tests
      - name: Run tests
        run: pytest
